requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 61000-Series for PV Inverters — Tajikstandart and Barqi Tojik / Donor-Lender Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 61000系列——Tajikstandart及Barqi Tojik/援助方-贷款方要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 61000系列——Tajikstandart及Barqi Tojik/援助方-貸款方要求

summary.en: Tajikstandart's conformity framework for electrical equipment adopts GOST/IEC standards including IEC 61000-series EMC standards. For solar PV inverters, the key EMC standards applied in Tajikstandart conformity assessments and in donor/lender (World Bank, ADB) project technical specifications are: (1) IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase; (2) IEC 61000-3-3 — Limits for voltage changes, voltage fluctuations, and flicker in low-voltage supply systems; (3) IEC 61000-6-1 / IEC 61000-6-2 — Immunity requirements for residential and industrial environments; (4) IEC 61000-6-3 / IEC 61000-6-4 — Emission limits for residential and industrial environments. IEC 62920 (dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment) may also be referenced in donor/lender technical specifications for larger utility-scale projects. No standalone Tajikstandart EMC Technical Regulation specifically for solar inverters has been identified; EMC requirements are embedded in the general electrical equipment conformity scope and project-level technical specifications.
summary.zh: Tajikstandart电气设备合格评定框架采纳了包括IEC 61000系列EMC标准在内的GOST/IEC标准。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，Tajikstandart合格评定及援助方/贷款方（世界银行、亚开行）项目技术规格中适用的主要EMC标准包括：（1）IEC 61000-3-2——电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A设备的谐波电流排放限值；（2）IEC 61000-3-3——低压供电系统中电压变化、电压波动和闪烁的限值；（3）IEC 61000-6-1 / IEC 61000-6-2——居住和工业环境的抗扰度要求；（4）IEC 61000-6-3 / IEC 61000-6-4——居住和工业环境的排放限值。IEC 62920（光伏功率变换设备专用EMC标准）也可能在较大公用事业规模项目的援助方/贷款方技术规格中被引用。目前尚未发现专门针对太阳能逆变器的独立Tajikstandart EMC技术法规；EMC要求包含在通用电气设备合格评定范围和项目级技术规格中。
summary.zht: Tajikstandart電氣設備合格評定框架採納了包括IEC 61000系列EMC標準在內的GOST/IEC標準。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，Tajikstandart合格評定及援助方/貸款方（世界銀行、亞開行）項目技術規格中適用的主要EMC標準包括：（1）IEC 61000-3-2——電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A設備的諧波電流排放限值；（2）IEC 61000-3-3——低壓供電系統中電壓變化、電壓波動和閃爍的限值；（3）IEC 61000-6-1 / IEC 61000-6-2——居住和工業環境的抗擾度要求；（4）IEC 61000-6-3 / IEC 61000-6-4——居住和工業環境的排放限值。IEC 62920（光伏功率轉換設備專用EMC標準）也可能在較大公用事業規模項目的援助方/貸款方技術規格中被引用。目前尚未發現專門針對太陽能逆變器的獨立Tajikstandart EMC技術法規；EMC要求包含在通用電氣設備合格評定範圍和項目級技術規格中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (adopted in GOST/IEC-aligned Tajikstandart framework)
IEC 61000-3-3 — Limits for voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker in low-voltage supply systems (adopted in GOST/IEC-aligned Tajikstandart framework)
IEC 61000-6-1 / IEC 61000-6-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Generic immunity standards for residential and industrial environments
IEC 61000-6-3 / IEC 61000-6-4 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Generic emission standards for residential and industrial environments

IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (referenced in donor/lender project specifications for utility-scale PV in Tajikistan)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework, referencing GB/T 17626-series standards (corresponding to IEC 61000-4-series) and GB/T 14549 for harmonic current limits. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While China's GB/T 17626-series aligns broadly with the IEC 61000-4-series test methods, Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not directly accepted by Tajikstandart as IEC 61000-series compliance evidence for conformity certification, and are not accepted by World Bank / ADB project procurement as equivalent to IEC 61000-3-2 or IEC 62920 evidence.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求，引用GB/T 17626系列标准（对应IEC 61000-4系列）和GB/T 14549谐波电流限值。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管中国GB/T 17626系列与IEC 61000-4系列测试方法大体一致，但仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被Tajikstandart直接接受为合格评定认证中IEC 61000系列合规证据，也不被世界银行/亚开行项目采购接受为IEC 61000-3-2或IEC 62920证据的等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求，引用GB/T 17626系列標準（對應IEC 61000-4系列）和GB/T 14549諧波電流限值。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管中國GB/T 17626系列與IEC 61000-4系列測試方法大體一致，但僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被Tajikstandart直接接受為合格評定認證中IEC 61000系列合規證據，也不被世界銀行/亞開行項目採購接受為IEC 61000-3-2或IEC 62920證據的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements referencing GB/T 17626-series
GB/T 14549-1993 — 电能质量 公用电网谐波 (Power quality — Harmonics in public supply networks)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy Tajikstandart IEC 61000-series requirements or World Bank / ADB project procurement EMC evidence requirements for Tajikistan. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-3 voltage fluctuation and flicker test report where applicable; (c) IEC 61000-6-2 immunity test report for the industrial environment; (d) for utility-scale donor/lender projects: IEC 62920 EMC type-test report. These reports should be specific to the power rating and configuration of the inverter model supplied to the Tajikistan project. Note: because Tajikistan's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V at 50 Hz) matches China's nominal voltage, retesting solely for grid voltage conditions is less likely to be required than in markets with different nominal voltages (e.g., 240/415 V Qatar). However, confirm with the project engineer whether Barqi Tojik actual voltage tolerance conditions affect EMC test result applicability.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足Tajikstandart的IEC 61000系列要求或塔吉克斯坦世界银行/亚开行项目采购EMC证据要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、针对特定逆变器型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告；（b）适用时的IEC 61000-3-3电压波动和闪烁测试报告；（c）工业环境下IEC 61000-6-2抗扰度测试报告；（d）对于公用事业规模援助方/贷款方项目：IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告。上述报告应针对供应至塔吉克斯坦项目的逆变器型号的额定功率和配置。注意：由于塔吉克斯坦名义电网电压（50 Hz 220/380 V）与中国名义电压一致，因电网电压条件需要重新测试的可能性低于名义电压不同的市场（如240/415 V卡塔尔）。但请向项目工程师确认Barqi Tojik实际电压容差条件是否影响EMC测试结果适用性。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足Tajikstandart的IEC 61000系列要求或塔吉克斯坦世界銀行/亞開行項目採購EMC證據要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、針對特定逆變器型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告；（b）適用時的IEC 61000-3-3電壓波動和閃爍測試報告；（c）工業環境下IEC 61000-6-2抗擾度測試報告；（d）對於公用事業規模援助方/貸款方項目：IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告。上述報告應針對供應至塔吉克斯坦項目的逆變器型號的額定功率和配置。注意：由於塔吉克斯坦名義電網電壓（50 Hz 220/380 V）與中國名義電壓一致，因電網電壓條件需要重新測試的可能性低於名義電壓不同的市場（如240/415 V卡達）。但請向項目工程師確認Barqi Tojik實際電壓容差條件是否影響EMC測試結果適用性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Tajikstandart conformity certification application covering electrical equipment; IEC 61000-3-2 and IEC 61000-6-2 evidence required in practice for donor/lender (World Bank, ADB) project procurement in Tajikistan; IEC 62920 required for utility-scale donor/lender projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: Tajikstandart — Agency for Standardization, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection of the Republic of Tajikistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Tajikstandart IEC 61000-series requirements or World Bank / ADB Tajikistan project procurement EMC evidence requirements. Obtain IEC 61000-3-2 and IEC 61000-6-2 test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before submitting the conformity package to Tajikstandart or a donor/lender project procurement team. For utility-scale projects, also obtain IEC 62920 EMC evidence. Because Tajikistan's nominal grid voltage matches China's 220/380 V at 50 Hz, voltage-condition retesting is less likely to be required than in markets with different nominal voltages — confirm with the project engineer. Verify current Tajikstandart EMC requirements and accepted test scope directly with the accredited certification body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足Tajikstandart的IEC 61000系列要求或世界银行/亚开行塔吉克斯坦项目采购EMC证据要求。在向Tajikstandart或援助方/贷款方项目采购团队提交合格评定包前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 61000-3-2和IEC 61000-6-2测试报告。对于公用事业规模项目，还须取得IEC 62920 EMC证据。由于塔吉克斯坦名义电网电压与中国220/380 V 50 Hz一致，因电压条件需要重新测试的可能性低于名义电压不同的市场——请向项目工程师确认。请直接向认可认证机构核实当前Tajikstandart EMC要求和认可测试范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足Tajikstandart的IEC 61000系列要求或世界銀行/亞開行塔吉克斯坦項目採購EMC證據要求。在向Tajikstandart或援助方/貸款方項目採購團隊提交合格評定包前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 61000-3-2和IEC 61000-6-2測試報告。對於公用事業規模項目，還須取得IEC 62920 EMC證據。由於塔吉克斯坦名義電網電壓與中國220/380 V 50 Hz一致，因電壓條件需要重新測試的可能性低於名義電壓不同的市場——請向項目工程師確認。請直接向認可認證機構核實當前Tajikstandart EMC要求和認可測試範圍。
